title: rubus obscurus var. insericatus
intro: Rubus obscurus var. insericatus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus obscurus var. insericatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
